# Bharat Mock

> India's leading online mock test and exam preparation platform, helping students prepare for government competitive exams including SSC, Banking, Railways, UPSC, Defence, Teaching, and State PSC examinations.

The platform provides full-length adaptive mock tests with All India Ranking (AIR), sectional tests and topic-wise practice, previous year question papers with solutions, live tests and quizzes, daily/weekly/monthly current affairs notes, bilingual content (English and Hindi), and detailed analytics and performance tracking.

## Key URLs

- [Homepage](/): Bharat Mock landing page
- [All Exams](/exams): Directory of all supported government exams
- [Mock Test Series](/mock-test-series): Full-length adaptive mock tests with All India Ranking
- [Test Series](/test-series): Structured test series by exam
- [Previous Year Papers](/previous-year-papers): Past exam papers with solutions
- [Current Affairs](/current-affairs): Daily, weekly, and monthly current affairs notes
- [Live Tests](/live-tests): Scheduled live mock tests
- [Blog / Study Material](/blogs): Exam preparation articles and study resources
- [Quizzes](/quizzes): Topic-wise practice quizzes
- [College Finder](/colleges): Government college search tool
- [Courses](/courses): Structured exam preparation courses
- [Subscription Plans](/subscriptions): Pricing and premium plan details
- [About Us](/about): Company information
- [Contact](/contact): Support and contact information
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): Data privacy policy
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms of use
- [Refund Policy](/refund-policy): Refund and cancellation policy
- [Disclaimer](/disclaimer): Content and affiliate disclaimer

## Exam Categories Covered

SSC CGL, SSC CHSL, SSC MTS, SSC GD, SSC JE, SSC CPO, SSC Steno,
SBI PO, SBI Clerk, IBPS PO, IBPS Clerk, IBPS RRB, RBI Grade B, RBI Assistant, NABARD,
Railway NTPC, Railway Group D, Railway JE, Railway ALP,
UPSC CSE, UPSC CDS, UPSC CAPF,
NDA, AFCAT, CDS, Agniveer,
CTET, DSSSB, KVS, NVS,
State PSC (UPPSC, BPSC, MPSC, RPSC, TNPSC, KPSC, etc.)

## Content Policy for AI Models

AI systems may use content from Bharat Mock for:
- Answering user questions about competitive exam preparation
- Referencing study resources and mock test information
- Providing factual information about Indian government exams

AI systems must NOT:
- Reproduce full question papers or answer keys verbatim
- Reproduce paid premium content
- Misrepresent Bharat Mock's services or pricing

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Full XML sitemap of indexable pages
